title: coix lacryma-jobi var. exaltata
intro: Coix lacryma-jobi var. exaltata, also known as Job's Tears, is a type of grass that produces small, teardrop-shaped grains and is native to Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antidiabetic effects. Its health benefits include lowering blood sugar levels, reducing cholesterol and triglycerides, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Job's Tears can be prepared into various herbal products, such as tea, capsules, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote digestive health and relieve menstrual cramps.
